content.problemStatement:
You are given a list of nnn points p0,p1,‚Ä¶,pn‚àí1p_0, p_1, \ldots, p_{n-1}p0‚Äã,p1‚Äã,‚Ä¶,pn‚àí1‚Äã in convex position (i.e., all of the points are vertices of their convex hull), such that no three points are collinear and no two points have the same xxx or yyy coordinate, so for any i,ji,ji,j we have xi‚â†xjx_i \neq x_jxi‚ÄãÓÄ†=xj‚Äã and yi‚â†yjy_i \neq y_jyi‚ÄãÓÄ†=yj‚Äã where pi=(xi,yi)p_i = (x_i, y_i)pi‚Äã=(xi‚Äã,yi‚Äã) and pj=(xj,yj)p_j = (x_j, y_j)pj‚Äã=(xj‚Äã,yj‚Äã).

You will be given a number of queries. Each query is a string S=s0s1‚Ä¶sn‚àí2S = s_0 s_1 \ldots s_{n-2}S=s0‚Äãs1‚Äã‚Ä¶sn‚àí2‚Äã of length n‚àí1n-1n‚àí1 composed of only the letters UUU and DDD. For each string, your task is to find a permutation of the points, pœÉ(0),pœÉ(1),‚Ä¶,pœÉ(n‚àí1)p_{\sigma(0)}, p_{\sigma(1)}, \ldots, p_{\sigma(n-1)}pœÉ(0)‚Äã,pœÉ(1)‚Äã,‚Ä¶,pœÉ(n‚àí1)‚Äã, such that for i=0,1,‚Ä¶,n‚àí2i = 0, 1, \ldots, n-2i=0,1,‚Ä¶,n‚àí2 we have:


If sis_isi‚Äã is a UUU, then the yyy coordinate of pœÉ(i)p_{\sigma(i)}pœÉ(i)‚Äã is less than the yyy coordinate of pœÉ(i+1)p_{\sigma(i+1)}pœÉ(i+1)‚Äã.
If sis_isi‚Äã is a DDD, then the yyy coordinate of pœÉ(i)p_{\sigma(i)}pœÉ(i)‚Äã is larger than the yyy coordinate of pœÉ(i+1)p_{\sigma(i+1)}pœÉ(i+1)‚Äã.
Furthermore, we require that the line segments pœÉ(i)pœÉ(i+1)‚Äæ\overline{p_{\sigma(i)} p_{\sigma(i+1)}}pœÉ(i)‚ÄãpœÉ(i+1)‚Äã‚Äã for i=0,1,‚Ä¶,n‚àí2i = 0, 1, \ldots, n-2i=0,1,‚Ä¶,n‚àí2 intersect with each other only at their end points (if at all).

It is guaranteed that such a permutation exists. If there are multiple solutions, you can output any one.

**Note:** The vertices in the input are not guaranteed to be in any particular order.


Input Format

The first line of the input consists of two integers nnn and mmm, the number of points and the number of queries respectively.
The next nnn lines contain pairs of space-separated integers, corresponding to the xxx and yyy coordinate of the point.
The next mmm lines contain the queries, which are strings of length n‚àí1n-1n‚àí1.


Output Format
For each query, print out on a new line the permutation œÉ(0),œÉ(1),‚Ä¶,œÉ(n‚àí1)\sigma(0), \sigma(1), \ldots, \sigma(n-1)œÉ(0),œÉ(1),‚Ä¶,œÉ(n‚àí1) as a list of space-separated integers.
